title: Edited message notifications
excerpt: When someone edits their message in conversation there should be a notification for the edit.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml: When someone edits their message in conversation there should be a notification for the edit.

posts.author: rachelmeltzerlee (Rachel Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a great idea to add an option to notify someone if someone changes their message frequently! Not quite the same, but I do really appreciate how if you hover over the “edited” section, it will tell you when someone edited their message so you can have a time reference of when they did!

posts.author: dnakanishi (Dean)
posts.cookedHtml:
I cannot believe this hasn’t been requested by more users!
I want to be notified whenever someone updates their original message. Otherwise, how else would anyone know that the original message was edited unless the editor sends them a separate message about it?

If they have to send other users a separate message about the update, then they could probably post the updated message in their new message instead of editing their original message.
